sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi svoje lične podatke na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information online.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ كَلِمَةَ الْمُرُورِ الْخَاصَّةَ بِكَ مَعَ الْغُرَبَاءِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Nikada ne dijeli svoju lozinku sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: Never share your password with strangers.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدِمْ مَوَاقِعَ آمِنَةً لِضَمَانِ خُصُوصِيَّتِكَ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristi sigurne stranice kako bi osigurao svoju digitalnu privatnost.
sentences.translationEn: Use secure sites to ensure your digital privacy.

sentences.arabic: الْوَعْيُ التِّقْنِيُّ أَمْرٌ ضَرُورِيٌّ فِي هَذَا الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Tehnička svijest je neophodna stvar u ovom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Technical awareness is a necessary matter in this era.
